U

updateCalendar(String, String, ZoneId) - Method in class calendar.view.gui.panels.CalendarListPanel
Updates a calendar in the list.
updateCalendarTimezone(String, ZoneId) - Method in interface calendar.model.CalendarModel
Updates the timezone associated with an existing calendar.
updateCalendarTimezone(String, ZoneId) - Method in class calendar.model.SparseHashCalendar
 
USE_CALENDAR - calendar.controller.parser.CommandType
 
useCalendar(String) - Method in interface calendar.model.CalendarModel
Selects the active calendar for subsequent operations.
useCalendar(String) - Method in class calendar.model.SparseHashCalendar
 
UseCalendarParams - Class in calendar.controller.parser
Parameters for the use calendar command.

Creates the parameter bundle for the use calendar command.
